description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in the test stage on the node:10 image. The test job should execute the shell commands "yarn install" followed by "yarn test" and capture test coverage using the regex "/All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/". No artifacts, rules, or deployment targets are required.
